summary: Verified the bug fix for stock transfers into a distributor's NON-factory warehouse being invisible on the Stock Dashboard. Logged in as CEO (surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth) and inspected the Stock tab for both distributors. Fix works end-to-end: transferred-in stock now counts as normal on-hand sellable stock without double-counting for factory-warehouse transfers.

success_rate.backend: 100% (via API responses captured during UI flow)

test_credentials: CEO: surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth / test123 (tenant Nyla Air Water) - working
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing distributors 'Surya Distributions' (d091204f-...) and 'Test' (99fb55dc-...) and their pre-existing stock transfers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock tab (data-testid=stock-dashboard-tab) on distributor detail page (/distributors/{id}) renders StockDashboardTab.jsx which calls GET /api/distributors/{id}/stock-dashboard. Response contains totals, factory_warehouses, and skus[] with stock_on_hand/stock_at_hand. Table columns: SKU, RECEIVED, DELIVERED, RESERVED, EMPTY BOTTLES, PRODUCT RET., FACTORY RET., WH. STOCK, AVAILABLE, % AVAIL, WKLY AVG. Factory Warehouse Stock card lists non-double-counted factory warehouse stock separately with 'WH. STOCK' column also populated for that SKU.

surya_distributions_transfer_in_non_fact.note: Previously missing from Stock-by-SKU table; now correctly appears (delivered via ST-2026-0003 + ST-2026-0004 to non-factory 1st Warehouse). API returned stock_on_hand=5, stock_at_hand=5.

test_distributor_factory_warehouse_no_do.note: Value appears in both the Factory Warehouse Stock card (Noida Factory Warehouse, 5 crates, 1 batch) AND the Stock-by-SKU table row (WH. STOCK=5, AVAILABLE=5), but counted only once in totals — no double counting. Received via ST-2026-0009.

verified_scenarios.no_render_errors: Stock Dashboard rendered cleanly for both distributors. No 500s, no blank pages, only unrelated 401s on pre-login /api/auth/me probe.
